creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Dwayne MacKinnon from comment #5)

<https://bugs.kde.org/show_bug.cgi?id=412078> was RESOLVED FIXED in February 2020. 

If the issue is no longer reproducible with Firefox 95.0.2 on FreeBSD, would you like to close this bug? Overcome by events, I guess. 

Thanks
